skill.name: turkce-asistan
skill.description: Türkçe metin yazımı, düzeltme ve üslup yardımı. Resmi/gayriresmi ton ayarı, sen/siz seçimi, Türkçe dilbilgisi kontrolü ve doğal Türkçe ifadeler için kullan. Türkçe yazarken, Türkçe metin düzeltirken veya Türkçe içerik üretirken aktive et.
skill.summary: Türkçe metin yazımı, düzeltme ve üslup yardımı. Resmi/gayriresmi ton ayarı, sen/siz seçimi, Türkçe d...
skill.author: cesareth

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported weak cryptography and shell backtick patterns, but review found no executable code, secrets, network access, or data exfiltration. The command findings are Markdown code fences around email templates, and the weak-crypto findings are ordinary Turkish prose or metadata.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Pattern
low_findings.description: FALSE_POSITIVE: The flagged lines contain Turkish skill metadata, writing guidance, or formal phrases. No hash algorithm, encryption code, or credential handling is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The inspected lines are prose and Markdown guidance only. I found no cryptographic API, weak hash name, encoded payload, or secret processing context.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Backtick Fences
low_findings.description: FALSE_POSITIVE: The flagged backticks delimit sample Turkish email templates. They are not Ruby shell execution and do not run commands.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The backticks are Markdown fences in a documentation file, surrounding plain email examples. There is no Ruby file, interpolation, shell command, or execution path.

content.user_title: Write Clear Turkish With Tone Guidance
content.value_statement: Writing clear Turkish can be difficult when tone, formality, and grammar must fit the audience. This skill guides Claude, Codex, and Claude Code to draft, revise, and polish Turkish text.
actual_capabilities: Drafts Turkish emails, requests, proposals, and short business messages.
Adjusts Turkish tone for formal, semi-formal, business, academic, blog, and social contexts.
Checks sen and siz usage for audience fit and consistency.
Replaces common foreign business terms with natural Turkish alternatives.
Uses included reference guidance for spelling, paragraph structure, connectors, and formal closing phrases.
limitations: Does not verify text against live TDK sources or current legal requirements.
Does not translate every domain-specific term with expert-level terminology.
Does not validate facts, names, dates, or claims inside the source text.
Provides language guidance, not legal, academic, or official document approval.

use_cases.title: Polish Business Email
use_cases.description: Revise a Turkish work email so it sounds clear, respectful, and suitable for the recipient.

use_cases.title: Prepare Formal Request
use_cases.description: Create a structured Turkish request with the right opening, explanation, request, and closing.

use_cases.title: Localize Marketing Copy
use_cases.description: Turn mixed Turkish and English copy into natural Turkish with a consistent tone.

prompt_templates.title: Fix Basic Turkish
prompt_templates.prompt: Düzelt: [metin]. Yazım, noktalama ve doğal Türkçe ifadeleri iyileştir. Anlamı değiştirme.

prompt_templates.title: Set Formal Tone
prompt_templates.prompt: Bu metni resmi ve saygılı Türkçeye çevir. Siz dili kullan. Kısa ve net tut: [metin].

prompt_templates.title: Draft a Complete Email
prompt_templates.prompt: Şu amaç için Türkçe iş e-postası yaz: [amaç]. Alıcı: [alıcı]. Ton: [resmi veya yarı resmi].

prompt_templates.title: Review Tone and Word Choice
prompt_templates.prompt: Bu Türkçe metni hedef kitleye göre incele: [metin]. Sen/siz, ton, yabancı kelimeler ve paragraf akışını değerlendir.

output_examples.input: Meeting için deadline update eder misin?
output_examples.output: Toplantı için teslim tarihini günceller misiniz?
Sayın Hocam, raporu tarafınıza ilettim. Uygun olduğunuzda inceleyebilirseniz memnun olurum.

best_practices: State the audience and relationship before asking for tone changes.
Specify whether the text should use sen or siz.
Ask for a concise revision when the text is for email, forms, or official use.
anti_patterns: Do not use it as the only review for legal or official submissions.
Do not request factual validation without providing sources.
Do not mix multiple unrelated documents in one prompt.

faq.question: What does this skill help with?
faq.answer: It helps write, revise, and polish Turkish text for different tones and audiences.

faq.question: Can it write formal Turkish emails?
faq.answer: Yes. It includes guidance for openings, closings, polite requests, and formal phrasing.

faq.question: Does it support sen and siz choices?
faq.answer: Yes. It guides the assistant to choose and keep the right form of address.

faq.question: Can it replace English business words?
faq.answer: Yes. It suggests common Turkish alternatives for words like meeting, deadline, and feedback.

faq.question: Does it check live grammar rules online?
faq.answer: No. It uses the included guide and does not browse current external references.

faq.question: Is it safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes. The reviewed files contain language guidance only and no executable code or network behavior.
